Who We Are

India's Trusted Generic Medicine Wholesale Network

Sri Vari Pharma Distributor has been serving the pharmaceutical supply chain for over 15 years. We bridge certified manufacturers with healthcare providers, offering competitive pricing without compromising quality.

📋

Fully Licensed & Compliant

Registered with Drug Control Authority with all required wholesale drug licenses and GST certifications.

🚚

Pan-India Cold-Chain Delivery

Temperature-controlled logistics from warehouse to your doorstep. Same-day dispatch for orders before 2 PM.

💰

Competitive Wholesale Pricing

Volume-based pricing tiers for hospitals, pharmacy chains, and medical stores. No hidden charges.

Our Portfolio

Product Categories

We supply over 5,000 generic medicines across all major therapeutic areas — all sourced from trusted, licensed manufacturers.

💉

IV Fluids

Normal Saline, Dextrose, Ringer Lactate, DNS and wide range of IV solutions with cold-chain handling for hospitals & clinics.

Cold Chain
💊

Generic Medicine

Antibiotics, Analgesics, Cardiovascular, Diabetic, Neurological and 5,000+ generic molecules in tablets, capsules & syrups at wholesale prices.

High Demand
🩺

Surgicals

Surgical gloves, syringes, sutures, bandages, dressings, catheters and all disposable surgical supplies from certified manufacturers.

Bulk Available
🧻

Cotton

Absorbent cotton rolls, cotton balls, cotton swabs and medical grade cotton products in bulk packs for hospitals, clinics & pharmacies.

OTC Available

Why Choose Us

Our Core Values

We are driven by principles that put our customers, partners, and community at the heart of everything we do.

👥

Customer Orientation

We live by and for our customer's success — we want to be their top-of-mind and top-of-heart choice. We build lasting relationships with our clients and associates. We create value for our clients by providing high-quality affordable products on time. We partner with our associates in their needs & wants thus develop lasting values. We care for our employees & help them grow holistically.

🤝

Trust

We are a company that is trusted in the marketplace — one that stands for integrity and sets standards for themselves. We take ownership of our actions & stand by our results & activities. We go by the word of mouth referrals and our reputation is our most effective advertising in this very competitive era. We follow the principle: if we are honest with our clients then they will trust us and be honest with us.

🏆

Team Spirit

We work together as one team. We share clients and associates across branches and business units. We share ideas and best practices. We help our colleagues to grow personally and professionally. We work hard and enjoy our work; we have fun in what we do. We will strive to provide unexcelled calibre offerings in Pharmaceuticals Distribution and ensuring customer delight basis, actual as well as the perceived value.

🧭

Leadership

We choose to lead in the respective segment and be the organization others choose to follow. We provide a vision for the future and thus provide direction, enable and empower people to follow with confidence. We live by our value-based management & make people feel important & appreciated for the required ethical work and thus inspiring. We act upon opportunities and learn fast from our success and failures. We set the pace with our expectations and examples to establish an environment of continuous improvement & people growth, both personally and professionally. We care & act with compassion.

⭐

Excellence

We commit ourselves to continuous improvement, seeking to set the recognized performance standards within our industry. We deliver a superior experience for all of our customers, sensing their needs and exceeding their expectations. We are passionate about people, our colleagues, associates & clients thus making a difference to them. We can recognize, respond and navigate through change effectively.
